1_auth.description: Authentication endpoints (no auth required except logout)

1.1_register.notes: Sets role=null by default. Admin must update role later. Sets refresh_token as HTTP-only cookie.

email.notes: Can be email address OR phone number

1.2_login.notes: 2FA required for roles: manager, accountant, auditor. Sets refresh_token cookie.

1.3_request_otp.notes: OTP expires in 5 minutes. Token signed with TimestampSigner (max age 180s). OTP sent via email.

1.4_verify_otp.notes: OTP max 5 attempts. Sets refresh_token cookie. Marks OTP as used.

1.5_refresh.auth: None (reads refresh token from HTTP-only cookie)
1.5_refresh.notes: Reads refresh_token from cookie only. If ROTATE_REFRESH_TOKENS is true, sets new refresh cookie. Returns 401 if cookie missing.

1.6_logout.notes: Blacklists refresh token. Deletes refresh_token cookie.

search.notes: Searches first_name, last_name, email, phone_number, role

ordering.notes: Fields: first_name, last_name, email, role, date_joined

role.notes: One of: admin, manager, accountant, grader, farmer, auditor

2.2_create.notes: cooperative_id auto-assigned from requesting user's cooperative.

2.7_me.description: Get or update current user profile

methods.notes: Cannot change own role or cooperative_id via me endpoint.

3_cooperatives.description: Cooperative management endpoints (public list/detail, admin for mutations)

search.notes: Searches first_name, last_name, member_number, phone_number, mpesa_number

ordering.notes: Fields: first_name, last_name, member_number, date_joined, phone_number

user_id.notes: Link to existing User for login

user_email.notes: Creates User+Farmer in one go. Returns temp_password

4.2_create.notes: id_number not returned in response (removed in to_representation). decrypted_id_number field available instead.

methods.auth: Bearer — farmer (requires user linked to farmer profile)
Bearer — farmer (requires user linked to farmer profile)

search.notes: Searches batch_id, farmer name, member_number, local_id

farmer.notes: Must be active and in same cooperative

5.2_create.notes: batch_id auto-generated. Triggers SMS notification to farmer via Celery.

5.7_sync.notes: Atomic transaction. All deliveries created in one go. Sends bulk SMS via Celery.

batch_id.notes: Returns batch detail with deliveries array

5.8_batches.notes: Returns paginated list when no batch_id filter. Returns single batch with deliveries when batch_id provided.

search.notes: Searches batch_id, grade_letter, farmer name, member_number

delivery.notes: Delivery must be PENDING, same cooperative, no existing grade

grade_letter.notes: A, B, C, PREMIUM, STANDARD. Cannot set with rejection_reason

rejection_reason.notes: Use instead of grade_letter for rejection. Cannot set with grade_letter

6.2_create.notes: Auto-updates delivery status to GRADED (or REJECTED). Triggers Celery task to update cooperative inventory.

6.4_update.notes: Syncs changes back to delivery (status, grade, rejection_reason).

6.7_override.notes: override_reason is REQUIRED. Sets is_overridden=true. Syncs delivery status. Triggers Celery inventory update.

methods.notes: unique_together on (grade_letter, effective_from). Cannot create duplicate on same date.

include_deliveries.notes: If true, includes delivery_count per farmer

8.1_map.notes: Only returns farmers with non-null lat/lng. Cooperative-scoped. Use ?include_deliveries=true to annotate delivery count.

9.1_map.notes: Falls back to farmer's lat/lng when delivery lat/lng is null (via Coalesce). Cooperative-scoped. Accepts optional ?date= and ?grade= filters.

10.1_list.notes: farmer_count is annotated via Count of distinct farmers across all stops. Paginated.

description.example: Covers Kamiti, Githunguri town, and Riara

path.notes: GeoJSON LineString. Must have at least 2 coordinates. Each coordinate is [lng, lat].

response_201.name: Githunguri Morning Route
response_201.description: Covers Kamiti, Githunguri town, and Riara

10.2_create.notes: cooperative_id auto-set from request user. Stops can be added separately via assign-stops.

response_200.name: Githunguri Morning Route
response_200.description: Covers Kamiti, Githunguri town, and Riara

10.3_detail.notes: Stops are ordered by stop_order. Farmer_ids are UUIDs of farmers assigned to that stop.

10.4_update.notes: Stops are NOT updated via PUT/PATCH — use the assign-stops endpoint for stops.

stop_order.notes: Sequential from 1, no gaps or duplicates

10.7_assign_stops.response_200: Full route detail (same as retrieve) with updated stops.
10.7_assign_stops.notes: Full replace in a transaction: deletes all existing stops, creates new ones. stop_order must be sequential from 1.

11_sales.description: Sales, buyer, and payment cycle endpoints (cooperative-scoped)

buyer.notes: Must be active and in same cooperative

payment_cycle.notes: UUID of payment cycle to link to

11.14_sale_create.notes: invoice_number auto-generated. total_amount computed as quantity * price_per_unit.
